en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Single Certification (CU) documentation in the Italy IRPEF Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Italy IRPEF Electronic Receipt of CU

The Consolidated Text of Income Tax Laws (TUIR) requires companies to act as tax withholding agents to withhold Personal Income Tax (IRPEF) on payments to individuals and to certify those withholdings through the Single Certification (CU) .\n\n
Please upload your Electronic Receipt from your latest Single Certification (CU) submission.
The Electronic Receipt issue date may vary depending on your company's classification and filing date.
Please enter the issue date of your Electronic Receipt from your latest Single Certification (CU) submission.
Please enter the expiration date as one year after the issue date.
Please enter the expiration date of your Electronic Receipt from your latest Single Certification (CU) submission.
